trends.name: Exam Preparation Peak
trends.recommended_action: Student exam season is starting. Pre-print study materials, ensure toner levels are optimal, and stock extra A4 paper.

trends.name: Festival & Marketing Peak
trends.recommended_action: Festival seasons (Diwali/Wedding) generate high demand for glossy pamphlets and invitations. Prepare premium color paper stocks.

trends.name: Early Week Corporate Workload
trends.recommended_action: Mondays and Tuesdays show 20% higher business printing volumes. Schedule maintenance on weekends instead.
